title: heliotropium lilloi
intro: Heliotropium lilloi, also known as Lillo's heliotrope, is a plant species native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and promoted wound healing. Herbal preparations of Heliotropium lilloi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and support overall well-being.
